allowed: Read-only queries to a maintainer-controlled local Ollama API for installed artifact metadata
Explicit maintainer-supplied lock files produced from that local API
prohibited: Automated access to Ollama-hosted services or registry endpoints without written permission
Treating an Ollama tag as immutable without recording its resolved digest
Redistributing model weights or license text
review_notes: Ollama hosted-service terms prohibit automated access without permission.
The resolver therefore defaults to 127.0.0.1 and rejects non-loopback endpoints unless explicitly overridden for a maintainer-controlled service.
